primary_composite.source: AACT NCT02545049 outcome_id=211209855 analysis_id=105497607 (CV composite HR 0.87, 95% CI 0.76-0.98, p=0.0264; Log Rank; stratified Cox model); PMID:34449181 (Pitt NEJM 2021); note: whole-trial CV composite used as DFS HF-subgroup primary anchor — HF-subgroup-specific HR not separately reported in AACT

acm.source: AACT NCT02545049 outcome_id=211209858 analysis_id=105497610 (ACM HR 0.89, 95% CI 0.77-1.04, p=0.1337; Log Rank; stratified Cox model); PMID:34449181 (Pitt NEJM 2021); whole-trial value — HF subgroup ACM not separately reported in AACT

cv_death.source: Derived (assumption: CV death HR approximated at 0.87 matching CV composite; PMID:34449181 does not separately report CV death CI; AACT NCT02545049 does not separately report CV death; baseline_prop 0.60 typical CV fraction; placeholder for clinician review)

non_cv_death.source: Derived from conservation law: non_cv HR = (ACM_HR - 0.60 x CV_death_HR) / 0.40 approx 0.925; CI approximate; PMID:34449181 does not separately report non-CV death; AACT NCT02545049 does not separately report non-CV death; placeholder for clinician review

delta_k.source: Derived (assumption: finerenone delta-K ~+0.18 mmol/L at higher baseline eGFR (68 mL/min); lower than FIDELIO given better renal function; extrapolated from FIGARO-DKD population; PMID:34449181; AACT NCT02545049 baseline_measurements does not report serum potassium change; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_sbp.source: Derived (assumption: ~1.5 mmHg SBP reduction; PMID:34449181 supplementary; AACT NCT02545049 baseline_measurements does not report SBP change; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_egfr.source: Derived (assumption: acute eGFR dip smaller at higher baseline eGFR; PMID:34449181; AACT NCT02545049 baseline_measurements does not report delta-eGFR; placeholder for clinician review)
